name: GeoAnomalyLogin
description: Detects login attempts from countries not in user's baseline geography
kql: SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where ResultType == 0 | join kind=leftouter (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(90d) | summarize KnownCountries=make_set(Location) by UserPrincipalName) on UserPrincipalName | where CountryOrRegion !in (KnownCountries) | project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, CountryOrRegion, IPAddress

name: EncodedPowerShell
description: Detects PowerShell executed with Base64-encoded commands (-enc/-EncodedCommand)
kql: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where FileName =~ 'powershell.exe' | where ProcessCommandLine matches regex '(?i)-(e|enc|encodedcommand)\s+[A-Za-z0-9+/=]{20,}' | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine

name: CredentialDumping
description: Detects LSASS memory access patterns associated with credential dumping tools
kql: DeviceProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where (FileName in~ ('procdump.exe','taskmgr.exe','processhacker.exe') and ProcessCommandLine contains 'lsass') or ProcessCommandLine has_any ('sekurlsa','logonpasswords','MiniDump') | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine

name: LateralMovementSMB
description: Detects explicit credential use (event 4648) for SMB lateral movement
kql: SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where EventID == 4648 | where SubjectUserName !endswith '$' | summarize count(), Targets=make_set(TargetServerName) by SubjectUserName, WorkstationName | where count_ > 3 | project SubjectUserName, WorkstationName, count_, Targets

name: DataExfiltration
description: Detects large outbound transfers (>50MB) to public IPs
kql: DeviceNetworkEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where RemoteIPType == 'Public' | extend BytesSentMB = tolong(AdditionalFields.BytesSent) / 1048576 | where BytesSentMB > 50 | project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, RemoteIP, BytesSentMB
